sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Conveyor Belt Ice
special_mechanics.description: Hatched ice blocks act as conveyor belts that slide the player character either left or right

special_mechanics.name: Moving Cloud Platforms
special_mechanics.description: Many mountains include unbreakable moving platforms resembling clouds. In VS. Ice Climber, some move diagonally or with strong wind gusts.

special_mechanics.name: Hammer Mechanics
special_mechanics.description: Players carry a wooden mallet to carve openings in ice above and club enemies

special_mechanics.name: Screen Push Mechanic
special_mechanics.description: White Bear enemy pounds ice and forces the screen to move upward if player takes too long to advance. Contact with top of screen results in loss of life.

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/qualitative data only. Sources document gameplay mechanics and level design but contain no explicit movement parameters, gravity values, jump physics, or sub-pixel system information. Game designed around 8-layer vertical mountains with obstacle avoidance and enemy interaction.
